name: MAGEN: SHINKEI NIGAI (DEMONIC MIRAGE: NERVOUS CONVULSIONS)

description.value:
Type: Genjutsu (Compulsion)

Rank: 5 (Spell Level 3)

Chakra Cost: 6

Learn DC: 19 | Successes: 3

Perform: 7 | Perform DC: 20

Components: C, E, H

The subject's brain is overwhelmed by conflicting signals, turning it against itself and overloading their nervous system. For five rounds, at the start of each of their turns, the subject suffers a cumulative -1 penalty to Defense, saves, ability checks and attack rolls. At the end of their fifth turn, the subject falls into a coma, becoming unconscious for 1 hour per level, during which the technique can no longer be dispelled. A comatose subject can only be awoken by a character with at least 12 ranks of Treat Injury, using the Iryou Ninjutsu: Iji - Shiketsu technique.

For the turns while it is still conscious, each turn the subject chooses either let the technique do its work and take no actions, or it can resist the technique, taking actions as normal but taking 1d8 damage. This damage cannot reduce the target below -1 HP, and if it is reduced to -1 HP by this damage, the subject remains stable and will immediately fall into a coma, as above.

If dispelled, any penalties suffered by the subject will remain in effect for 1d4 rounds.

Empower: Spend 6 Chakra to bypass the first five rounds and immediately send the subject into the coma. Can be empowered only once per day.
